mcpServer.description: Normalized MCP server config. Union of stdio + http/sse transports across Claude/Gemini/Copilot/OpenCode/Cursor/Windsurf.

includeTools.description: Tool allowlist from this server. Native: Gemini `includeTools`, Amp `includeTools`, ADK `tool_filter`.

po-antigravity.description: Per-provider overrides for antigravity. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

config.customAgent.systemPromptConfig.in.description: Which built-in system-prompt sections (context blocks) to inject into the subagent's prompt, including mcp_servers and skills context.

config.customAgent.systemPromptSections.description: The subagent's system prompt, expressed as ordered titled sections (e.g. title 'Agent System Instructions', content = the instructions). This is the system-prompt mechanism — it is a field, not a markdown body.

config.customAgent.toolNames.description: Allowlist of tools the subagent may invoke.

description.description: Human/orchestrator-facing description of what the subagent specializes in.

hidden.description: Visibility flag controlling whether the subagent is surfaced/selectable.

model.description: unverified — no model field appears in the confirmed agent.json example; the official schema may include one.

tools.description: Tool access control override. Use native provider tool names. Wildcards (*), MCP patterns (mcp_*), and Agent() spawn syntax are always accepted.

oneOf.description: Allowlist of native tool names or wildcard patterns.
Map of tool-name → enabled (provider-specific bool-map form, e.g. opencode).

po-claude-code.description: Per-provider overrides for claude-code. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

background.description: Set to true to always run this subagent as a background (concurrent, non-blocking) task.

color.description: Display color for the subagent in the task list and transcript.

description.description: Natural-language statement of when Claude should delegate to this subagent. Drives automatic delegation; include phrases like 'use proactively' to encourage delegation.

disallowedTools.description: Denylist of tools removed from the inherited or specified pool. Applied before tools; a tool listed in both is removed.

effort.description: Effort/reasoning level when this subagent is active; overrides the session effort level.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hooks scoped to this subagent; run only while it is active and are cleaned up when it finishes. Stop hooks are converted to SubagentStop at runtime. Ignored for plugin subagents.

initialPrompt.description: Auto-submitted as the first user turn when this agent runs as the main session agent (via --agent or the agent setting). Prepended to any user-provided prompt. Ignored when invoked as a subagent.

isolation.description: Set to worktree to run the subagent in a temporary git worktree with an isolated copy of the repository, branched by default from the default branch. Auto-cleaned if the subagent makes no changes.

maxTurns.description: Maximum number of agentic turns before the subagent stops.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers scoped to this subagent. Inline servers connect when the subagent starts and disconnect when it finishes; string references share the parent session's connection. Ignored for plugin subagents.

memory.description: Persistent memory scope giving the subagent a directory (user: ~/.claude/agent-memory/<name>/, project: .claude/agent-memory/<name>/, local: .claude/agent-memory-local/<name>/) that survives across conversations. Enables cross-session learning; auto-enables Read/Write/Edit and injects MEMORY.md (first 200 lines or 25KB).

model.description: Model the subagent uses. Resolution order: CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL env > per-invocation model param > this frontmatter > main conversation model.

permissionMode.description: Controls how the subagent handles permission prompts. Ignored for plugin subagents. If parent uses bypassPermissions/acceptEdits/auto, that takes precedence and cannot be overridden.

prompt.description: Used only in CLI --agents JSON and the SDK AgentDefinition (where it is required) to supply the system prompt, equivalent to the Markdown body in file-based subagents. Not a frontmatter field in Markdown agent files.

skills.description: Skills to preload into the subagent's context at startup. The full skill content is injected, not just the description. Subagents can still invoke unlisted skills via the Skill tool.

tools.description: Tool allowlist for this agent. Use native provider tool names. Wildcards (*), MCP patterns (mcp_*), and Agent() spawn syntax are always accepted.

po-codex.description: Per-provider overrides for codex. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

description.description: Human-facing guidance describing when Codex should use this agent.

developer_instructions.description: Core behavior definition for the subagent; this is where the system prompt / instructions are expressed.

mcp_servers.description: MCP server configuration scoped to this subagent.

model.description: Model the subagent uses; falls back to the parent session model when unset.

nickname_candidates.description: Pool of display nicknames for the spawned agent thread.

sandbox_mode.description: Filesystem/network restriction level; can override the parent session (e.g. tighten to read-only).

skills.config.description: Per-skill overrides available to the subagent.

po-cursor.description: Per-provider overrides for cursor. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

description.description: Short description shown in Task tool hints; the parent agent reads this to decide delegation.

is_background.description: If true, the subagent runs in the background without blocking the parent agent.

model.description: Model the subagent runs with; 'inherit' uses the parent agent's model.

readonly.description: If true, the subagent runs with restricted write permissions (tool gating to read-only).

po-gemini-cli.description: Per-provider overrides for gemini-cli. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

description.description: Explains what the agent does; read by the main agent to decide delegation

kind.description: Whether the subagent runs locally or as a remote agent

max_turns.description: Maximum conversation turns for the subagent

mcpServers.description: Inline MCP server configurations scoped only to this subagent

model.description: Model override; 'inherit' uses the main session model

tools.description: Tool access control override. Use native provider tool names. Wildcards (*), MCP patterns (mcp_*), and Agent() spawn syntax are always accepted.

oneOf.description: Allowlist of native tool names or wildcard patterns.
Map of tool-name → enabled (provider-specific bool-map form, e.g. opencode).

po-github-copilot.description: Per-provider overrides for github-copilot. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

agents.description: List of agent names available as subagents in this agent (VS Code).

argument-hint.description: Hint text shown in the chat input field to guide users (VS Code). Not supported for Copilot cloud agent.

description.description: Outlines the agent's purpose and capabilities. Required for Copilot cloud agent; in VS Code shown as placeholder text in the chat input field.

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, prevents the agent from being automatically invoked as a subagent by other agents.

handoffs.description: Suggested next actions/prompts to transition between agents (VS Code). Not supported for Copilot cloud agent.

hooks.description: Hook commands scoped to this agent (VS Code, Preview feature).

infer.description: Retired. Replaced by disable-model-invocation and user-invocable.

mcp-servers.description: Additional MCP servers and tools for the agent. Used by Copilot cloud agent; not used in VS Code/IDE custom agents.

metadata.description: Enables agent annotation; not used in VS Code or IDE agents.

model.description: Model used to run the agent. Array form = try models in order (VS Code/IDEs). Array syntax is rejected by Copilot CLI (single string only).

target.description: Restricts the agent to a specific environment; available in both if unset.

tools.description: Tool allowlist for this agent. Use native provider tool names. Wildcards (*), MCP patterns (mcp_*), and Agent() spawn syntax are always accepted.

user-invocable.description: Controls whether the agent appears in the agents dropdown for manual selection.

po-goose.description: Per-provider overrides for goose. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

activities.description: Optional clickable example-prompt bubbles shown when the recipe opens in Goose Desktop.

description.description: Detailed explanation of what the recipe does.

extensions.description: MCP servers / extensions the recipe needs. Defines the agent's available tools. See extensions[] sub-fields.

instructions.description: Sets the agent's role/context (system-prompt-like). Parameter values are substituted before the recipe runs.

parameters.description: Runtime-substituted variables referenced as {{ key }} in instructions/prompt/activities. See parameters[] sub-fields.

prompt.description: Initial user prompt/message to start the session. Required when running non-interactively.

response.description: Structured-output schema for automation workflows. Field: json_schema (object, required) — JSON schema for output validation.

retry.description: Automated retry/validation logic. Fields: max_retries (number, required), checks (array of {type:"shell", command}, required), timeout_seconds (number, default 300), on_failure_timeout_seconds (number, default 600), on_failure (string shell command).

sub_recipes.description: Sub-agents this recipe invokes; each points at another recipe file and runs as an isolated sub-agent task. See sub_recipes[] sub-fields.

title.description: Short descriptive name of the recipe.

version.description: Recipe schema version; defaults to 1.0.0 if omitted.

po-grok-cli.description: Per-provider overrides for grok-cli. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

_userSettingsContext.description: subAgents[] lives inside user-settings.json alongside these keys. Project file .grok/settings.json documents only 'model' and 'mcpServers'.

instruction.description: The subagent's system prompt / persona instruction (e.g. 'Prioritize security implications and suggest concrete fixes.').

model.description: Model used when this subagent runs; overrides the default model for the subagent's turns.

po-opencode.description: Per-provider overrides for opencode. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

description.description: Brief explanation of what the agent does and when to use it. Used for routing/@mention discovery.

disable.description: When true, the agent is disabled and not loaded.

mode.description: Interaction mode. primary = main assistant cycled via Tab; subagent = specialized, invoked automatically or via @mention; all = eligible as both.

model.description: Model override for this agent in provider_id/model_id form.

permission.description: Fine-grained per-tool gating (replaces `tools`). "ask" prompts for approval, "allow" runs without approval, "deny" disables the tool. Keys are matched as wildcard patterns against the underlying tool name (built-ins, custom tools, and MCP tools).

prompt.description: Custom system prompt for this agent. Can reference an external file via {file:./prompts/x.txt} (path relative to config). If omitted, the markdown body is used.

steps.description: Maximum agentic iterations (legacy alias maxSteps, deprecated).

temperature.description: Sampling randomness; lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative.

tools.description: DEPRECATED opencode tool enable/disable map. Keys are native tool names; values are booleans (true=enable, false=disable). Superseded by `permission`.

po-roo-code.description: Per-provider overrides for roo-code. Fields correspond to native provider frontmatter (excluding `name` which is not overridable).

customInstructions.description: Specific behavioral guidelines appended near the end of the system prompt for this mode.

description.description: Short, user-friendly summary shown below the mode name in the selector.

groups.description: Tool groups allowed for the mode. Each element is a group name (read|edit|browser|command|mcp) or a two-element ["edit",{fileRegex,description}] tuple.

iconName.description: unverified - not documented in the official custom-modes field list.

model.description: unverified - per-mode model is assigned via API Configuration Profiles in the Settings/Prompts UI (with sticky per-mode memory), not via a documented field inside the .roomodes/custom_modes.yaml mode object.

roleDefinition.description: Defines the core identity and expertise of the mode; placed at the very start of the system prompt.

slug.description: Unique internal identifier for the mode; used in directory/file names such as .roo/rules-{slug}/.

source.description: Internal field indicating mode origin; auto-added by Roo Code and should not be set manually.

whenToUse.description: Guidance for Roo's automated/orchestration mode-selection decisions; not displayed in the UI.

description: Provider-neutral, file-based agent (subagent) definition. Synthesized from 13 providers (2026-06-10). Each property notes which native provider fields it normalizes. A file-based agent = a config artifact (Markdown+YAML frontmatter, YAML, TOML, or JSON) that declares a named agent's persona, model, and tool access. Sources: see agent-definition-semantics-report.html.

background.description: Run as a non-blocking background task. Native: Claude `background`, Cursor `is_background`.

description.description: What the agent does / when to delegate to it. Drives auto-delegation in most tools. REQUIRED in Claude, Gemini, Copilot(cloud), Roo(recommended), OpenCode, Goose. Maps to: `description` everywhere; Roo also has `whenToUse`.

disallowedTools.description: Denylist applied before/over the allowlist. Native: Claude `disallowedTools`, Gemini `excludeTools` (settings), Amp `amp.tools.disable`.

maxTurns.description: Cap on agentic turns. Native: Claude `maxTurns`, Gemini `max_turns` (default 30), Goose settings.max_turns, OpenCode `steps` (unverified).

mcpServers.description: MCP servers scoped to this agent. Maps to: Claude `mcpServers`, Gemini `mcpServers`, Copilot `mcp-servers`, OpenCode top-level `mcp` (referenced). Per-server shape normalized below.

mode.description: Whether this is a primary (user-facing) agent or a delegated subagent. Native: OpenCode `mode`. Implicit elsewhere (Claude subagents are always subagent unless run via --agent; Cursor `is_background`).

model.description: Model override. Commonly supports the literal 'inherit'. Maps to: Claude `model`, Gemini `model`, Cursor `model`, Copilot `model` (string|array prioritized list), OpenCode `model` (provider/model-id), Grok `model`, Goose settings.goose_model. Default usually 'inherit' (parent/session model).

model_settings.description: Provider-specific model tuning passthrough (reasoning effort, top_p, etc.). Native: Claude `effort`, Codex model_reasoning_effort, OpenAI SDK model_settings, Aider .aider.model.settings.yml. Kept opaque for portability.

name.description: Unique agent identifier / slug. Convention: lowercase + hyphens. Maps to: Claude Code `name`, Gemini `name`, Cursor `name`, Copilot `name`/filename, OpenCode filename, Roo `slug` (regex ^[a-zA-Z0-9-]+$), Grok-community subAgents[].name, Goose recipe `title`.

permissionMode.description: Permission / autonomy posture. Maps to: Claude `permissionMode` (default|acceptEdits|auto|dontAsk|bypassPermissions|plan), OpenCode `permission` map (allow|ask|deny per tool), Grok config [ui].permission_mode (always-approve|ask), Goose GOOSE_MODE (auto|approve|chat|smart_approve), Codex approval_policy.

providerOverrides.description: Per-provider field overrides. Keys are the registered provider ids. Unknown provider ids are rejected (additionalProperties: false). The `name` field is never overridable — set it only at the top level.

readonly.description: Restrict the agent to read-only (no writes). Native: Cursor `readonly`. Approximated by Roo omitting the `edit` group, or OpenCode permission edit:deny.

skills.description: Preloaded skills (Agent Skills standard, SKILL.md). Native: Claude `skills`. Many tools support skills as a separate file surface rather than an agent field.

systemPrompt.description: The agent's system prompt / persona / instructions. In Markdown-frontmatter formats this is the file BODY (Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Copilot, OpenCode). As a field it maps to: OpenCode `prompt`, Grok-community subAgents[].instruction, Roo `roleDefinition`(+`customInstructions`), Goose `instructions`, OpenAI Agents SDK `instructions`, ADK `instruction`.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature. Native: Gemini `temperature` (0-2), OpenCode `temperature`, Goose settings.temperature (0-1).

timeoutMins.description: Max execution time in minutes. Native: Gemini `timeout_mins` (default 10).

tools.description: Tool access control. Heterogeneous across providers; normalize to allow/deny + group semantics. Maps to: Claude `tools`/`disallowedTools`, Gemini `tools` (wildcards * / mcp_* / mcp_<server>_*), Copilot `tools` (names|['*']|[]), OpenCode `tools` map {tool:bool} (deprecated) or `permission`, Roo `groups` (read|edit|browser|command|mcp + fileRegex), Goose extensions[].available_tools.

oneOf.description: Allowlist of tool names (or wildcard patterns).

title: CommonAgentDefinition
